revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 20 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 20 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月20日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * （[[208年]]_月_日） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[揚子江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]元年<!--（[[1211年]]_月_日）--> - 土佐に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]元年<!--（[[1224年]]_月_日）--> - 元仁に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[長禄]]2年<!--（[[1458年]]_月_日）--> - [[尼子晴久]]、[[戦国武将]]（+ [[1562年]]） * [[安政]]6年<!--（[[1859年]]_月_日）--> - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月19日 (旧暦)|11月19日]] 翌日[[11月21日 (旧暦)|11月21日]] - 前月[[10月20日 (旧暦)|10月20日]] 翌月[[12月20日 (旧暦)|12月20日]] *新暦[[11月20日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: 長禄2年11月20日生まれは尼子晴久ではなく尼子経久らしいので修正
revision.text:

== できごと == * [[建安]]13年<!-- 後漢 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[208年]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1211年]][[12月26日]]） - 土佐に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1224年]][[12月31日]]） - 元仁に改元

revision.comment: /* 誕生日 */ 尾崎行雄を修正、安政6年は尾崎の戸籍上の生年につき同5年に直す。

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月20日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13年<!-- 後漢 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[208年]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1211年]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1224年]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== 誕生日 == * [[長禄]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1458年]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1676年]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1655年]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]]

== できごと == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13年<!-- 後漢 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[208年]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1211年]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1224年]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== 誕生日 == * [[長禄]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1458年]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1676年]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1655年]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar November}} '''November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 20'''<!--Lunar November20--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13年<!-- 後漢 -->（[[ユリウス暦]][[208年]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1211年]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1224年]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1458年]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1676年]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1655年]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

== Births == * [[長禄]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1458年]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1676年]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732年]]） * [[天明]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1782年]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明暦]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1655年]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572年]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.

[[sn:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[208]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1211]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1224]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[明治]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1458]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541]]） * [[延宝]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1676]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732]]） * [[天明]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1782]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809]]） * [[安政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1858]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]]） * [[明治]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1871]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945]]）
== Deaths == * [[明暦]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1655]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572]]）

revision.comment: attempting a full on mass replacement of all the era names
revision.text:
[[sn:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[208]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1211]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1224]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1871]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1458]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541]]） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}}4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1676]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732]]） * [[天明]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1782]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809]]） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1858]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1871]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}}1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1655]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]]13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]][[12月15日]]） - [[赤壁の戦い]]。[[孫権]]・[[劉備]]の連合軍と[[曹操]]軍が[[長江]]の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]][[12月26日]]） - [[土佐国|土佐]]に流されていた僧・[[法然]]が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]][[12月31日]]） - [[承元]]より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]][[12月31日]]） - 旧[[甲斐国]]全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]]が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]]2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]][[12月25日]]） - [[尼子経久]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（+ [[1541]]） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}}4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]][[12月24日]]） - [[細川宣紀]]、第4代[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1732]]） * [[天明]]2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]][[12月24日]]） - [[毛利斉房]]、[[長州藩]]主（+ [[1809]]） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]][[12月24日]]） - [[尾崎行雄]]、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]][[12月31日]]） - [[深井英五]]、政治家（+ [[1945]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}}1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]][[12月17日]]） - [[宇喜多秀家]]、[[安土桃山時代]]の武将（* [[1572]]）

[[sn:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていた僧・[[法然]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[天明]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[安土桃山時代]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていた僧・[[法然]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[天明]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[安土桃山時代]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていた僧・[[法然]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[天明]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[長州藩]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[安土桃山時代]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[建暦]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていた僧・[[法然]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[天明]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[安土桃山時代]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）

[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[Kenryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていた僧・[[法然]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[Kenryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていたMonk・[[Hōnen]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）== See Also ==

[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[Kenryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていたMonk・[[Hōnen]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ） == See Also ==

[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[Kenryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていたMonk・[[Hōnen]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] [[zh:十一月廿]] [[en:draft:November 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[建安 (漢)|建安]] 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[208]] [[December 15]] ） - [[赤壁の戦い]] 。[[孫権]] ・[[劉備]] の連合軍と[[曹操]] 軍が[[長江]] の赤壁で戦い孫権・劉備軍が勝利 * [[Kenryaku]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1211]] [[December 26]] ） - [[土佐国|土佐]] に流されていたMonk・[[Hōnen]] が帰洛を許され、京都東山大谷に戻る * [[元仁]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1224]] [[December 31]] ） - [[承元]] より元仁に[[改元]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - 旧[[甲斐国]] 全域を管轄区域として[[山梨県]] が発足
== Births == * [[長禄]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1458]] [[December 25]] ） - [[尼子経久]] 、[[武将|戦国武将]] （+ [[1541]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 24]] ） - [[細川宣紀]] 、第4代[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1732]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1782]] [[December 24]] ） - [[毛利斉房]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 主（+ [[1809]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 24]] ） - [[尾崎行雄]] 、政治家「憲政の神様」（+ [[1954]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[December 31]] ） - [[深井英五]] 、政治家（+ [[1945]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1655]] [[December 17]] ） - [[宇喜多秀家]] 、[[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] の武将（* [[1572]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|19|11|21|10|20|12|11|1120}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1211]] – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|ja|法然}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1211]] – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|ja|法然|12=draft}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1211]] – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|ja|法然|12=draft}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1211]] – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|ja|法然|12=draft}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840455]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 20|qq=November 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月二十]][[zh:十一月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840455]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 20|qq=November 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111|qq=}}

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:208|208]] – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1211|1211]] – December 26): The monk [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]]—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1224|1224]] – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1458|1458]] – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1782|1782]] – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:658|658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1348|1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月二十]][[zh:十一月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月二十]][[zh:十一月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月二十]][[zh:十一月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840455]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 20|qq=November 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|208|en|208|WD=Q31268|lt=208}} – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211}} – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|WD=Q507980|lt=Hōnen}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1224|en|1224|WD=Q5402|lt=1224}} – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1458|en|1458|WD=Q6522|lt=1458}} – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}} – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}} – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|658|en|658|WD=Q30176|lt=658}} – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1348|en|1348|WD=Q6085|lt=1348}} – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|208|en|208|WD=Q31268|lt=208}} – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211}} – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|WD=Q507980|lt=Hōnen}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1224|en|1224|WD=Q5402|lt=1224}} – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1458|en|1458|WD=Q6522|lt=1458}} – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}} – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}} – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|658|en|658|WD=Q30176|lt=658}} – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1348|en|1348|WD=Q6085|lt=1348}} – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the designated day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|208|en|208|WD=Q31268|lt=208}} – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211}} – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|WD=Q507980|lt=Hōnen}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1224|en|1224|WD=Q5402|lt=1224}} – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1458|en|1458|WD=Q6522|lt=1458}} – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782}} – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}} – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|658|en|658|WD=Q30176|lt=658}} – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1348|en|1348|WD=Q6085|lt=1348}} – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111|qq=}}

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Jian'an era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|208|en|208|WD=Q31268|lt=208|1=208}} – December 15): The Battle of Red Cliffs took place, where the allied forces of Sun Quan and Liu Bei defeated Cao Cao on the Yangtze River. * In the 1st year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1211|en|1211|WD=Q5251|lt=1211|1=1211}} – December 26): The monk {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|WD=Q507980|lt=Hōnen|1=Hōnen}}—who had been exiled to Tosa—was allowed to return to Kyoto’s eastern foothills (Higashiyama Otani). * In the 1st year of the Gen'nin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1224|en|1224|WD=Q5402|lt=1224|1=1224}} – December 31): The era name was changed from Shōgen to Gen'nin. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} – December 31): Yamanashi Prefecture was established as the governing area covering the entirety of the former Kai Province.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Chōroku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1458|en|1458|WD=Q6522|lt=1458|1=1458}} – December 25): Ashikaga Tsuguhisa, a Sengoku-period warlord, was born (died 1541). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}} – December 24): Hosokawa Nobunori, the 4th lord of the Kumamoto Domain, was born (died 1732). * In the 2nd year of the Tenmei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}} – December 24): Mōri Tadayoshi, lord of the Chōshū Domain, was born (died 1809). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} – December 24): Ozaki Yukio, a politician known as the "God of Constitutionalism," was born (died 1954). * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} – December 31): Fukai Eigo, a politician, was born (died 1945).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643|1=643}} – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family and son of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|658|en|658|WD=Q30176|lt=658|1=658}} – December 11): Prince Arima, a son of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era / 3rd year of the Shōhei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1348|en|1348|WD=Q6085|lt=1348|1=1348}} – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
